nasb.text: Besides, whom should I serve? Should I not serve in the presence of his son? As I have served in your father’s presence, so I will be in your presence.”

esv.text: And again, whom should I serve? Should it not be his son? As I have served your father, so I will serve you.”

cnv.text: 再者，我要事奉誰呢？不是前王的兒子嗎？我以前怎樣事奉你的父親，我現在也必怎樣事奉你。”

ccb.text: 再说，我应当服侍谁呢？难道不该服侍王的儿子吗？我要像服侍你父亲一样服侍你。”
